task_completion.description: Wondershare EdrawMax application is open and active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax application window is visible on the screen, and any login dialogs have been dismissed.

task_completion.description: A 5-tier pyramid diagram is created on the canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A pyramid shape divided into 5 distinct horizontal tiers is visible on the EdrawMax canvas.

task_completion.description: The pyramid tiers are labeled with the correct security layers from bottom to top.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text labels are present on the pyramid tiers in this exact order from bottom (widest) to top (narrowest): 'Physical Security', 'Network Security', 'Host Security', 'Application Security', and 'Data Security'.

task_completion.description: The title 'Defense in Depth Model' is added near the pyramid.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text box containing 'Defense in Depth Model' is visible on the canvas near the pyramid diagram.

task_completion.description: The project is saved as defense_in_depth_pyramid.eddx.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The filename 'defense_in_depth_pyramid.eddx' is visible in the EdrawMax title bar, a save dialog, or the file manager in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

task_completion.description: The diagram is exported as defense_in_depth_pyramid.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog showing the .png format and filename, or the file 'defense_in_depth_pyramid.png' is visible in the file manager in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with EdrawMax tools, shapes, and text boxes, rather than a text editor writing XML.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to create fake files.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing commands like 'touch' or 'echo' to create the .eddx or .png files directly.

integrity.description: The export process was done via EdrawMax's export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the EdrawMax export menu or dialog being used, rather than a generic screenshot tool.
